chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: 4440 - وَ رَوَى مُوسَى بْنُ بَكْرٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "لاَ يُدْخَلُ بِالْجَارِيَةِ حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ لَهَا تِسْعُ سِنِينَ أَوْ عَشْرُ سِنِينَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4440 - And Musa ibn Bakr narrated from Zurara, from Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"A girl should not be consummated with until she reaches nine or ten years of age."
